allow: PowerShell(Get-MpComputerStatus | Select-Object IsTamperProtected, RealTimeProtectionEnabled 2>&1; Write-Output "---SmartAppControl---"; try { \(Get-CimInstance -Namespace root\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Sense -ClassName MDATPConfiguration -ErrorAction Stop\) } catch { Write-Output "n/a" }; Write-Output "---WDAC events---"; Get-WinEvent -LogName "Microsoft-Windows-CodeIntegrity/Operational" -MaxEvents 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List TimeCreated, Id, Message)
